criteria.text: Anchor sums to weekday columns: in a row-label month grid with a Mon..Sun header row, each metric sums only columns under a weekday header; cells outside the day grid (notes column, far-right stray like K) are not counted
Covid regression fixed: a Covid test row that is 0 across Mon..Sun but has a stray 4709 in an out-of-grid column parses to covid=0, not 4709
Existing values unchanged (back-compat): current Totals-Madison tabs and the column-header MAD-27 layout still yield the same 11 metric values; only out-of-grid cells are removed
No-weekday-header fallback: a row-label grid with no detectable weekday header row falls back to the prior all-non-Totals summation (no silent zeroing)
PHI-safe: the stray cell value is never logged or surfaced; unmapped labels stay reference-only (no cell values)
